parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { note: 'Connect a Gmail, IMAP or Microsoft Outlook node here. Produce a compact emailSummary object with unread count, urgent threads and draft suggestions.' } }];
return [{ json: { note: 'Connect an Asana node here. Return asanaSummary with urgent tasks, blocked tasks, due today and suggested new tasks.' } }];
return [{ json: { note: 'Connect HubSpot contacts/deals/search nodes here. Return hubspotSummary with new leads, stale deals, hot deals and follow-up suggestions.' } }];
return [{ json: { note: 'Connect Google Analytics 4 reporting nodes here. Return ga4Summary with sessions, conversions, top channels and anomalies.' } }];
return [{ json: { note: 'Connect Google Ads reporting nodes here. Return googleAdsSummary with campaign KPIs, spend, conversions, ROAS and alerts.' } }];
